_note: Copy to datasources.json. Controls server, scheduler, and data source connection settings. Sites are managed via the /sites UI — not stored here.

usgs._note: Parameters fetched for all USGS sites. Codes: 00060=discharge 00065=gage height 00010=water temp 00300=DO 00400=pH

cwms._note: US Army Corps CDA public API. Set office to your district code. Check cwms-data.usace.army.mil/cwms-data/catalog/TIMESERIES?office=YOUR_OFFICE to verify it is on the national instance.
